---
title: "mimir_client.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\mimir_client.py"
loc: 46
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.48
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.45
---

## Intent
The `mimir_client.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on MimirClient, __init__, think, get_file_intent, close, test_mimir. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via MimirClient, __init__, think, get_file_intent, close, test_mimir. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 62 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `MimirClient`
- `__init__`
- `think`
- `get_file_intent`
- `close`
- `test_mimir`
